global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text and interactive elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to stream new hits with a free trial.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a lively and energetic feel.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center, featuring two overlapping shapes that suggest a dynamic layout.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, large black text stating 'Stream the hype' is prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller black text below the headline reads 'New hits every week', providing additional context.

elements.label: App logo
elements.description: A simple logo labeled 'MoonScreen' appears at the top left, featuring a clean and modern font.

elements.label: Overlapping shape
elements.description: An abstract shape that overlaps with the main content area, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Secondary shape
elements.description: Another abstract shape that complements the main subject, enhancing the design's complexity.

elements.label: Play button icon
elements.description: A small play button icon located at the top right, indicating interactivity.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent black button at the bottom with the text 'Try for free', encouraging user engagement.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype New hits every week

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: CTA text
elements.description: Text on the call to action button reads 'Try for free', designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element that adds visual flair but does not convey specific information.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, key elements include bold text and a call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the logo is at the top left, and the CTA is at the bottom.
